dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gap confirmation modeled as open price gap relative to previous close. Breakout direction set to BOTH (bullish and bearish). Entry uses gap + MA50 crossover + position in candle body. Exits triggered by MA50 reversals. Success rates and volume trends marked as AUTHOR_SILENT were not translatable to specific conditions. Maximum hold period set to 20 days as a reasonable reversal timeframe for candlestick patterns.

source_rule_text: Candlestick pattern with breakout confirmation: Bullish or bearish reversals using opening price gaps and moving average crossovers
